title: Sentinel-as-Code Summary Rule
description: Schema for Sentinel-as-Code summary rules (Log Analytics scheduled aggregation).

name.description: Rule name (alphanumeric and hyphens only). Used as the resource name.

displayName.description: Display name shown in the Azure portal. Defaults to name.

query.description: KQL summarization query. Must NOT include explicit time filters — the bin boundary is the implicit window.

destinationTable.description: Target custom log table. Must end with the _CL suffix.

binDelay.description: Wait minutes before executing each bin, to account for ingestion latency.

binStartTime.description: ISO 8601 timestamp at which the first bin starts. Must fall on a whole-hour boundary.
